title: ComponentSpec
description: PhysWorldLM Component Specification Format (PW-CSF) v1.0. Canonical definition of every physical, electrical, logical, computational, mechanical, structural, sensing, communication, propulsion, and software subsystem that can exist inside an Entity. Supports unlimited recursive nesting. Simulator-independent, ontology-friendly, knowledge-graph-friendly, military-grade.

Range.description: Inclusive numeric range with optional unit.

unit.description: SI unit symbol or custom string.

MountTransform.description: Local-space transform of this component relative to its parent.

position.description: Offset in meters from parent origin.

MaterialRef.description: Reference to a material defined in world.schema.json or inline definition.

inline.description: Inline material definition if not referencing a WorldSpec material.

ComponentType.description: Canonical component type enumeration covering all known physical, electrical, computational, sensing, actuation, structural, and weapon subsystems.

OperationalState.description: Runtime operational state of the component.

IdentityBlock.description: Complete identity and provenance fields for a component.

component_id.description: Primary UUID of this component instance.

parent_component_id.description: UUID of the parent component (null for root).

entity_owner_id.description: UUID of the owning Entity in WorldSpec.

world_id.description: UUID of the WorldSpec this component belongs to.

ontology_uri.description: URI linking this component to an ontology class e.g. 'pw:TurbofanEngine'.

persistent_identifier.description: Persistent external ID e.g. NATO NSPA stock number, NSN, UUID from external system.

template_id.description: Template component this instance was derived from.

ClassificationBlock.description: Taxonomic and ontological classification of a component.

HierarchyBlock.description: Component tree structure, containment, and attachment relationships.

child_component_ids.description: Direct child components in the assembly tree.

assembly_id.description: Assembly group this component belongs to.

dependency_ids.description: Components this component functionally depends on.

attachment_point.description: Named attachment point on parent e.g. 'left_wing_pylon_1'.

depth_in_tree.description: Depth from root entity (0 = root component).

bill_of_materials_ref.description: Reference to an external BOM document or URI.

component_tree_path.description: Dot-separated path from root entity e.g. 'aircraft.left_engine.fuel_pump.motor'.

is_redundant_of.description: Primary component ID if this is a redundant backup.

PhysicalBlock.description: Geometric and physical material properties of the component.

wet_mass_kg.description: Mass when fully loaded with fluids.

geometry_asset_ref.description: Path or URI to mesh asset (USD, GLB, OBJ, FBX).

radar_cross_section_m2.description: Radar cross section in m². Negative = classified.

noise_equivalent_delta_t.description: NEDT in millikelvin for thermal imagers.

interfaces.description: All communication interfaces exposed by this component.

connected_to_id.description: Component or port this interface connects to.

rf_properties.description: RF-specific properties if the component is an RF transceiver or antenna.

SensorEmbeddedSpec.description: An embedded sensor sub-element within a component.

ActuatorEmbeddedSpec.description: An embedded actuator sub-element within a component.

RuntimeStateBlock.description: Runtime dynamic state of the component during simulation.

state_since_s.description: Simulation time (s) when current state began.

custom_state.description: Domain-specific runtime key-value state not covered above.

ResourceBlock.description: Consumable and allocatable resource tracking for this component.

MaintenanceBlock.description: Maintenance, reliability, and prognostic health management data.

phm_model_ref.description: Reference to a PHM/prognostic model file or URI.

RelationshipsBlock.description: Typed semantic relationships to other components and entities.

EnvironmentalRatingsBlock.description: Environmental qualification and rating standards compliance.

SafetyBlock.description: Safety classification, interlocks, and certification data.

WeaponBlock.description: Weapon-specific properties for components classified as weapons or weapon subsystems.

PropulsionDetailBlock.description: Detailed propulsion-specific properties beyond generic performance.

SoftwareBlock.description: Software and firmware configuration for computational components.

software_partitions.description: ARINC 653 partitions or similar time/space partitions.

configuration_parameters.description: Operational configuration parameters as key-value pairs.

MetadataBlock.description: Provenance, authorship, simulation, and knowledge-graph metadata.

simulation_only.description: True if this component only exists in simulation.

real_world_ref.description: Reference to a physical real-world asset or digital twin source.

knowledge_graph_node.description: Knowledge graph node URI for this component.

simulation_lod.description: Level of detail for simulation purposes.

asset_refs.description: External asset references (USD, GLB, STEP, CAD files).

Component.description: Canonical Component definition for PhysWorldLM. Every physical, electrical, logical, computational, mechanical, structural, sensing, communication, propulsion, or software subsystem that may exist in a simulation. Supports unlimited recursive nesting.

embedded_sensors.description: Sensors physically embedded within this component.

embedded_actuators.description: Actuators physically embedded within this component.

sub_components.description: Recursively nested child components. Supports unlimited depth (e.g. Aircraft → Engine → Fuel Pump → Motor → Bearing → Seal → Material).

custom_extensions.description: Domain-specific extension fields not covered by the canonical schema. Use namespaced keys e.g. 'pw_military:fire_control_mode'.

sub_components.description: Recursively nested child components. Supports unlimited depth.
